scripts.build: if [ ! -d "$HOME/flutter" ]; then git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git --depth 1 -b stable $HOME/flutter; fi && $HOME/flutter/bin/flutter build web --release --base-href / --dart-define=SUPABASE_URL="${SUPABASE_URL}" --dart-define=SUPABASE_ANON_KEY="${SUPABASE_ANON_KEY}" --dart-define=FIREBASE_API_KEY="${FIREBASE_API_KEY}" --dart-define=FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID="${FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID}" --dart-define=FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID="${FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID}" --dart-define=FIREBASE_APP_ID="${FIREBASE_APP_ID}" --dart-define=FIREBASE_VAPID_KEY="${FIREBASE_VAPID_KEY}" && mv build/web public
